channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Leonard says returning to the court is the easy part after making season debut for Clippers
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — After what Kawhi Leonard has gone through the past nine months, returning to the court for the Los Angeles Clippers was the easy part. Leonard played 19 minutes and scored 12 points in his season debut Saturday night to help the Clippers beat the Atlanta Hawks 131-105.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals keep their playoff hopes alive by edging the Steelers 19-17
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Joe Burrow will head to Cincinnati's training facility on Sunday. He'll lift weights. He might watch some video. And then he'll join the rest of his teammates and hope. It's not much.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US beats Czechia 4-1 to set up world junior hockey final against Finland
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Boston University's Cole Eiserman broke a second-period tie and the defending champion United States beat Czechia 4-1 on Saturday night to advance to the world junior hockey championship game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Heat begin a new chapter: Life without Jimmy Butler, who is suspended and seeking a trade
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — For the 119th time since Jimmy Butler joined Miami, the Heat played a game without him. This was different from the others. And it went very — very — badly for Miami.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago Bulls plan to retire Derrick Rose's jersey next season
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Derrick Rose wasn't sure how he will feel when sees his No. 1 hanging from the rafters. He was still trying to process the news. The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday they plan to retire Rose's jersey sometime next season.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chiefs finally depart KC for Denver amid ice storm after 4 hours spent waiting on the tarmac
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Chiefs finally departed from Kansas City International Airport for their game in Denver on Saturday after spending about four hours stranded on the tarmac amid an ice storm that blanketed the region ahead of an impending blizzard.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU gets trounced by #14 Houston 86-55
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team came into the Big 12 season thinking it could compete with the top teams in one of the toughest leagues in the nation. But if Saturday was any indication, the Cougars have a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sonny Smart, father of Georgia coach Kirby Smart, dies after a fall in New Orleans
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Georgia coach Kirby Smart’s father, Sonny, died early Saturday of complications from hip surgery after falling in New Orleans ahead of the Sugar Bowl, the school announced.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets turn to familiar face in search for new head coach: report
item.description: The New York Jets are bringing in their former head coach, Rex Ryan, for an interview for their current head coaching vacancy per NFL Network's Ian Rapoport.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Seahawks prank rookie Byron Murphy II with outrageous dinner bill
item.description: Seattle Seahawks defensive tackle Byron Murphy II was too stunned to speak when his teammates pranked him with an outrageous bill after their annual rookie dinner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PGA Tour moves toward changes to FedEx Cup finale. Finding a solution everyone likes won't be easy
item.description: KAPALUA, Hawaii (AP) — Commissioner Jay Monahan wasn't kidding when he told the PGA Tour staff in his year-end message that “everything was on the table.” That includes what could be another massive overhaul at the Tour Championship to determine the FedEx Cup champion.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dolphins' Tua Tagovailoa 'unlikely' to play with playoff berth at stake due to hip injury
item.description: Miami Dolphins head coach Mike McDaniel said that starting quarterback Tua Tagovailoa is "unlikely" to play against the Jets due to a hip injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Five things to watch in 49ers’ season finale at Arizona Cardinals
item.description: Jauan Jennings' 1,000-yard quest and Joshua Dobbs' starting debut are worth watching in the 49ers' season finale Sunday, while fans also should stay curious about Jake Moody's kicks and the turnover-lacking defense.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Chargers and Raiders heading in different directions as teams meet in regular-season finale
item.description: The Chargers and Raiders each enter Sunday's meeting coming off back-to-back victories that affect each other's futures in remarkably different ways.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James breaks Michael Jordan's record for 30-point games with his 563rd
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James broke Michael Jordan's NBA record for 30-point games during the Los Angeles Lakers' victory over Atlanta on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Red Rocks cruise past Utah State in season opener
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The fifth-ranked Utah gymnastics team kicked off its 50th anniversary season in style, overcoming a slow start to eventually secure a dominant victory over Utah State Friday night at the Huntsman Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Victor Wembanyama after 100 games: Set to turn 21, his numbers are staggering
item.description: Victor Wembanyama's days as a 20-year-old in the NBA are over. He turns 21 on Saturday. And on the final day before that birthday, Wembanyama hit another milestone — 100 NBA games.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Heat suspend Jimmy Butler for 7 games and will seek to trade him
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler was Miami's best player for five years, the leader of a team that went to the NBA Finals twice in his tenure. He talked big and, at times, played bigger. He spoke with reverence for the city, for the franchise, for the famed “Heat Culture.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Women's wrestling thrives under Coach Mercado's leadership
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa University women’s wrestling coach Travis Mercado expressed gratitude for his team’s commitment and drive to succeed. “I’m just grateful to have a group of young ladies that I trust and who trust me,” Mercado said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Dolphins' Tagovailoa 'unlikely' to play Sunday against Jets, Huntley in line for 2nd straight start
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Quarterback Tua Tagovailoa is expected to miss his second straight game when the Dolphins travel to face the New York Jets on Sunday in a matchup with playoff implications, coach Mike McDaniel said Friday.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears CB Jaylon Johnson earns team's lone Pro Bowl selection this season, his 2nd straight
item.description: Bears cornerback Jaylon Johnson has been selected to represent the NFC at the 2025 Pro Bowl Games, the NFL announced Thursday morning. The games will be held a week before the Super Bowl, on Sunday, Feb. 2, at Camping World Stadium in Orlando, Fla.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni set to rest Saquon Barkley in finale and end chance at NFL rushing record
item.description: Saquon Barkley had a heart-to-heart talk with his dad that was more coated in heartbreak than hope over the Philadelphia Eagles running back's pursuit of the NFL single-season rushing record.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl in New Orleans postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame has been postponed after a truck plowed into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away early Wednesday, killing at least 10 people.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Illinois holds off South Carolina in Citrus Bowl for first 10-win season since 2001
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Josh McCray scored his second touchdown of the game on a 9-yard run midway through the fourth quarter to give No. 21 Illinois the lead, and the Illini held on to beat No. 14 South Carolina, 21-17, in the Cheez-It Citrus Bowl on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies improve to 13-1 after 69-64 win over Nevada
item.description: RENO, Nev. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men's basketball (13-1, 3-0 MW) closed out 2024 with a victory, wrapping up an undefeated three-game road trip with a 69-64 win over Nevada at the Lawlor Event Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes blown out in Big 12 opener by Baylor, 81-56
item.description: WACO, Tex. (AP) - It was a rude awakening to the Big 12 Conference for the Runnin' Utes. V.J. Edgecombe scored 19 points, three other Baylor players had 15 and the 25th-ranked Bears led throughout in an 81-56 win over Utah on Tuesday in the Big 12 opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Westbrook's triple-double leads Denver past Utah
item.description: DENVER (AP) - Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Holiday Classic: Lincoln Stockton 64, Mission Bay 45
item.description: In the American Bracket Championship Game of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Lincoln High School from Stockton, CA defeated Mission Bay 64-45.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 75, Windward 74
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO)-Montgomery playing in the fifth place game on Monday afternoon went to overtime for bonus basketball against Windward and won 75-74. Lead by Senior, JJ Sanchez who poured in 27. While fellow senior Devin Hamilton added 18, and Alek Sanchez, twin of JJ hit for 12.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Bears plan to start Caleb Williams, other healthy starters for season finale at Green Bay
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Bears plan to have Caleb Williams make one more start rather than hold their prized rookie quarterback out of the season finale at Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SDFNL All-Star Showcase
item.description:
Boys All-Star Game : Blue Stars 21- Red Stars 17
Girls Flag Football All-Star Game: Blue Stars 6 - Red Stars 0
San Diego 13U Youth Super Bowl: San Diego Bolts 34 - Oceanside Warriors 22
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Darnold gives Vikings another gem with career-high 377 yards in 27-25 win over Packers
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings were ready to start their postgame ritual in honor of a ninth consecutive victory before realizing Sam Darnold was still missing from the raucous locker room because he was finishing his interview with the TV broadcasting crew.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thompson-Herro fight leads to ejections of multiple players and coaches in Heat's victory in Houston
item.description: Rockets forward Amen Thompson threw Heat guard Tyler Herro to the floor to trigger an altercation that resulted in six ejections in the closing minute of Miami's 104-100 victory over Houston on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Moment of silence for former President Jimmy Carter held before the Falcons-Commanders game
item.description: Jimmy Carter was honored with a moment of silence before the Atlanta Falcons’ game at the Washington Commanders on Sunday night, hours after the 39th president of the United States died at the age of 100 in Plains, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jake Evans scores for the career-high 4th consecutive game, surging Canadiens beat Lightning 5-2
item.description: Jake Evans scored for the career-high fifth consecutive game and the surging Montreal Canadiens beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 5-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
